  "findings": [
    "Over-greasing has blown/purged the bearing seal, compromising the bearing's protection."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt work, clean excess grease, inspect the bearing for contamination or damage, and replace the blown seal or the entire bearing assembly if integrated."
  ],
  "rationale": "Over-greasing has caused the seal to purge or blow out. According to SKF and Timken mounting and maintenance guides, a blown seal cannot properly retain lubricant or exclude contaminants, requiring replacement of the seal or the entire bearing unit before returning the asset to service.",
  "references": [
    "SKF Bearing Installation and Maintenance Guide",
    "Timken Engineering Manual - Lubrication and Seals"
  ]
}
